MavenDemo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
MavenDemo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or validate against Java 21 APIs and syntax, which is required for a J17 -> J21 migration.
